output_debit_classifier.reason: Atlas Van Lines borrowed $200,000 cash from the bank. This is a straightforward loan transaction. The company receives cash (asset increase) and incurs a liability (notes payable or loan payable increase). The interest rate and payment terms are provided for future reference but do not affect the initial journal entry for receiving the loan proceeds. At the time of borrowing, only the principal is recorded; interest will be accrued and paid in future periods.
